overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a spaceship navigating through a dense asteroid field around a massive industrial space station with green navigation lights. The player pilots the ship around the station structure and through scattered asteroids in deep space, approaching a large spherical habitation module.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space approach to industrial station

events.description: ship begins slight pitch adjustment to align with station approach vector

agents.ego_description: piloting the spaceship in a steady approach toward the station, maintaining course with minor adjustments

entered.detail: large industrial space station with multiple modules and green navigation lights
rocky asteroid surface with craters visible on the left side of the flight path
bright green navigation lights marking the station's approach corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady approach toward a massive industrial space station in deep space. The station's green navigation lights are visible ahead while a rocky asteroid terrain occupies the left side of the frame. The ship maintains a stable forward trajectory as the station gradually grows larger in the viewport.

events.description: ship pitches upward sharply to navigate over the station structure
station superstructure temporarily blocks view of deep space background

agents.ego_description: maneuvering the ship around the station structure, pitching up and adjusting trajectory to avoid collision with the superstructure

entered.detail: the underside of the station with structural beams and maintenance panels
large cylindrical engine components attached to the station

segments.scene_description: The ship pitches upward to circumnavigate the station, bringing the massive superstructure into close view. The underside of the station reveals complex industrial architecture with engine nacelles visible in the distance. The rocky asteroid terrain falls behind as the ship maneuvers around the station's bulk.

events.description: exiting station proximity into open space with scattered asteroid field
ship banks slightly left to navigate through asteroid debris

agents.ego_description: navigating through scattered asteroids while moving away from the station, adjusting course to avoid debris

entered.detail: large spherical station module with illuminated windows and docking ports
field of small to medium asteroids floating in open space

segments.scene_description: Having cleared the station, the ship enters open space filled with scattered asteroids. The main station recedes into the left background while a large spherical habitation module comes into view on the right. The ship banks gently to navigate through the asteroid debris field.

events.description: ship adjusts trajectory to approach the spherical habitation module

agents.ego_description: piloting toward the spherical structure, making final approach adjustments while avoiding nearby asteroids

entered.detail: massive irregular asteroid with detailed rocky surface texture

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on approaching the large spherical habitation module, which grows to dominate the center of the frame. A massive asteroid formation appears on the left while the original station fades into the distance. The ship maintains a steady approach vector toward the spherical structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person trajectory from a steady approach through an asteroid field toward the imposing bulk of an industrial space station. It begins with a stable forward glide toward the station's distant green navigation lights, while rocky asteroid terrain lines the left side of the viewport. As the ship draws closer and the station grows in scale, the camera pitches upward to circumnavigate the massive superstructure. This maneuver shifts the perspective to the station's underside, revealing complex industrial architecture and distant engine nacelles as the asteroid field falls away behind the ship.

The shot follows a continuous first-person flight from the periphery of an industrial station toward a massive spherical habitation module. It begins as the ship clears the main station, which recedes into the left background while the vessel banks gently to navigate through a field of scattered asteroids. As the ship pushes deeper into open space, the spherical module emerges on the right and gradually grows to dominate the center of the frame. The scene then shifts as a massive asteroid formation looms on the left, further distancing the original station. Finally, the camera maintains a steady approach vector, closing the gap toward the imposing surface of the habitation structure.
